---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for VibeXP
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this solve, or what would it enable? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, links, or anything else relevant.
